2026-05-31T09:35:08.4496766Z ##[group]Run # Create a temporary file
2026-05-31T09:35:08.4497211Z [36;1m# Create a temporary file[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.4497481Z [36;1mtouch /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.4497735Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.4497978Z [36;1m# Add the opening of the asciiart definition[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.4498364Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciiart =' > /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.4498704Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.4498911Z [36;1m# Decode base64 ASCII art to a file[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.5986416Z [36;1mecho "" | base64 -d > /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7475135Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7475468Z [36;1m# Process each line of the input ASCII art and format it properly[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7475886Z [36;1mwhile IFS= read -r line; do[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7476165Z [36;1m  # Escape backslashes[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7476465Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$line" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g')[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7476796Z [36;1m  # Escape any double quotes[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7477130Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$escaped_line" | sed 's/"/\\"/g')[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7477521Z [36;1m  # Add the line with proper C string formatting[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7478224Z [36;1m  echo '"'"$escaped_line"'\n"' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7478911Z [36;1mdone < /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7479176Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7479385Z [36;1m# Add the closing part with VERSION[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7479857Z [36;1mecho '"             Free60.org XeLL - Xenon Linux Loader " VERSION "\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7480301Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7480506Z [36;1m# Add the asciitail part[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7480938Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciitail =' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7481502Z [36;1mecho '"    Special Corona & Winchester Compatible XeLL version\n\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7481971Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7482176Z [36;1m# Ensure CP437 encoding[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7482742Z [36;1miconv -f UTF-8 -t CP437 /tmp/new_asciiart.h > /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h || cp /tmp/new_asciiart.h /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7483320Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7483516Z [36;1m# Replace the original file[0m
2026-05-31T09:35:08.7483835Z [36;1mcp /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h source/lv2/asciiart.h[0m
